storyboard.content: I've been having lower back pain that started when I moved heavy furniture last month.
The pain sometimes shoots down my right leg.
It's been going on for about 4 weeks now and hasn't really gotten better.
The pain is around a 5 out of 10. I can still go to work but it's uncomfortable a lot of the time.
Sitting for a long time makes the pain a lot worse.
Over-the-counter pain relievers help a little but the pain always comes back once they wear off.
I'm a 38-year-old man who sits at a desk most of the day for work.
